nasb.text: On the east there were six Levites, on the north four daily, on the south four daily, and at the storehouse two by two.

esv.text: On the east there were six each day, on the north four each day, on the south four each day, as well as two and two at the gatehouse.

cnv.text: 守東門的有六個利未人，守北門的每日有四人，守南門的每日有四人，守庫房的兩人一組。

ccb.text: 每天有六个利未人守东门，四人守北门，四人守南门，守库房的二人一组。
